rulings.Case Title: AARON S. GORFEIN VS. DANIEL RAY BACON et al

rulings.Case Title: CRAIG JOHANN DOUGLAS VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 3, 2010, line 2, DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MALCOLM FONG, MICHAEL ZHANG MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment denied. Motion for summary adjudication granted as to false arrest, first cause of action, no opposition. Motion for summary adjudication denied as to remaining issues. Triable issue of fact raised whether the use of force was reasonable. (Henrion deposition 40:14-18, 43:13-44:12). =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MARIO ZAPPALA VS. EDWARD JONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 3, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANTS EDWARD JONG, GOLDEN PACIFIC REALTY AND INVESTMENT CO. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion denied, failure to shift the burden of proof. Plaintiff alleges that defendant breached a written contract as well as oral agreements. The oral agreements regarded various specifics about how the work was to be carried out and plaintiff performed accordingly. Furthermore, triable issue of fact exists whether the parties made a new, separate oral agreement, or if they orally modified the original agreement. =(302/CWW)
